failure.message: The frozen candidate fitter stopped at ca042713 because at least one 1980--2009 monthly-total column has zero sample standard deviation and the registered station-month standardization is undefined.

semantic_change: Represent the already fail-closed candidate-fit exception as structured candidate infeasibility and apply the prospectively registered legacy-only null terminal. No station, period, candidate, standardization, coefficient, threshold, metric, guard, or terminal priority changes; the zero-scale month is not dropped, imputed, pooled, or repaired.
selection_effect: The optional candidate remains ineligible. The amendment cannot select or improve it and publishes no candidate coefficient.
